creator: christophe.cap@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the late reply, but this bug can be closed again.

Both drives broke down in the end.
I got them replaced, and bought some new SATA cables.

Now everything boots fine with 6.3 (upgraded in the meantime to 7.x)

Possible causes:
- bad batch of disks. (2 died & were replaced under warranty)
- sata cables (replaced with beter quality cables that 'clip' into the drive

Thanks to everyone looking into this.

Christophe
